title: Out of context error
description: This chat is reaching the AI’s memory limit, like a whiteboard filling up. We can expand the memory window (called context size) so it remembers more, but it may use more of your computer’s memory. We can also truncate the input, which means it will forget some of the chat history to make room for new messages.
increaseContextSizeDescription: Do you want to increase the context size?
outOfMemoryTitle: Not enough memory to load the model
outOfMemoryDescription: The model requires more RAM or VRAM than is currently available. Try closing other applications, picking a smaller / more quantized model, or reducing the context size.
modelLoadFailedDescription: The model could not be started. {{message}}
multimodalUnsupportedTitle: Vision/audio not supported by this backend
multimodalUnsupportedDescription: This model isn't supported by the current backend ({{backend}}). Try switching to {{alternative}} in Settings → Model Providers, or update the app.
multimodalUnsupportedDescriptionNoAlt: This model isn't supported by the current backend ({{backend}}). Try updating the app, or use a different model.
archNotSupportedTitle: Model not supported by this backend
archNotSupportedDescription: This model's architecture isn't supported by the current backend ({{backend}}) yet. Try switching to {{alternative}} in Settings → Model Providers, or update the app.
archNotSupportedDescriptionNoAlt: This model's architecture isn't supported by the current backend ({{backend}}) yet. Try updating the app, or use a different model.
modelFileMissingDescription: The model file couldn't be found — it may have been moved or deleted. Try re-downloading the model.
modelFileCorruptDescription: The model file appears to be incomplete or corrupted, likely from an interrupted download. Delete the model and download it again.
